prompt: I want to upgrade this Rijksmuseum KMP project to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.13.0. The composeApp module uses kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.application (incompatible with AGP 9). The project has many modules (core:*, feature:*) managed through custom convention plugins in build-logic/convention. Please do the full migration.
source: Rijksmuseum — composeApp has KMP+application (Path B), uses build-logic convention plugins, KSP
agent_rubric: The composeApp module is split: a new androidApp with com.android.application is created
settings.gradle.kts includes the new androidApp module
Custom convention plugins in build-logic/ are updated for AGP 9 compatibility
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
